de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Interface SolverType

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSolverType

    public interface SolverType
    This interface is used for modeling different solvers. It provides methods that encode information about the concrete solver: - name - command for starting the solver - parameters - supported versions

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static List<SolverType> ALL_SOLVERS 
      static SolverType CVC3_SOLVER
      Class for the CVC3 solver.
      static SolverType CVC4_SOLVER
      CVC4 is the successor to CVC3.
      static SolverType SIMPLIFY_SOLVER
      Class for the Simplify solver.
      static SolverType YICES_SOLVER
      Class for the Yices solver.
      static SolverType Z3_CE_SOLVER
      Class for the Z3 solver.
      static SolverType Z3_SOLVER
      Class for the Z3 solver.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean checkForSupport()
      Checks for support and returns the result.
      SMTSolver createSolver(SMTProblem problem, SolverListener listener, Services services)
      Creates an instance of SMTSolver representing a concrete instance of that solver.
      SMTTranslator createTranslator(Services services)
      The translator to be used.
      String getDefaultSolverCommand() 
      String getDefaultSolverParameters()
      The default parameters which should be used for starting a solver
      String[] getDelimiters()
      The delimiters of the messages that are sent from the solver to KeY.
      String getInfo()
      Some specific information about the solver which can be presented.
      String getName()
      Returns the name of the solver.
      String getRawVersion()
      Retrieve the version string without check for support.
      String getSolverCommand()
      the command for starting the solver.
      String getSolverParameters()
      The currently used parameters for the solver.
      String[] getSupportedVersions()
      Returns an array of all versions that are supported by KeY.
      String getVersion()
      Returns the current version that is installed, if it has already been checked, otherwise null.
      String getVersionParameter()
      Returns the parameter that can be used to gain the version of the solver when executing it.
      boolean isInstalled(boolean recheck)
      Checks whether the solver is installed.
      boolean isSupportedVersion()
      Returns whether the currently installed version is supported.
      String modifyProblem(String problem)
      Directly before the problem description is sent to the solver one can modify the problem string by using this method.
      void setSolverCommand(String s) 
      void setSolverParameters(String s) 
      boolean supportHasBeenChecked()
      returns true if and only if the support has been checked for the currently installed solver.
      boolean supportsIfThenElse()
      Returns true if and only if the solver supports if-then-else terms.

    • Field Detail

      • Z3_SOLVER

        static final SolverType Z3_SOLVER
        Class for the Z3 solver. It makes use of the SMT2-format.

      • Z3_CE_SOLVER

        static final SolverType Z3_CE_SOLVER
        Class for the Z3 solver. It makes use of the SMT2-format.

      • CVC3_SOLVER

        static final SolverType CVC3_SOLVER
        Class for the CVC3 solver. It makes use of the SMT1-format.

      • CVC4_SOLVER

        static final SolverType CVC4_SOLVER
        CVC4 is the successor to CVC3.

      • YICES_SOLVER

        static final SolverType YICES_SOLVER
        Class for the Yices solver. It makes use of the SMT1-format.

      • SIMPLIFY_SOLVER

        static final SolverType SIMPLIFY_SOLVER
        Class for the Simplify solver. It makes use of its own format.

      • ALL_SOLVERS

        static final List<SolverType> ALL_SOLVERS

    • Method Detail

      • createSolver

        SMTSolver createSolver(SMTProblem problem,
                     SolverListener listener,
                     Services services)
        Creates an instance of SMTSolver representing a concrete instance of that solver.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns the name of the solver.

      • isInstalled

        boolean isInstalled(boolean recheck)
        Checks whether the solver is installed. If recheck is set to true the method should check for the path variable of the system and for the absolute path, otherwise it can return the result of the previous call.

      • getInfo

        String getInfo()
        Some specific information about the solver which can be presented. null means no information.

      • getSolverParameters

        String getSolverParameters()
        The currently used parameters for the solver.

      • setSolverParameters

        void setSolverParameters(String s)

      • getDefaultSolverParameters

        String getDefaultSolverParameters()
        The default parameters which should be used for starting a solver

      • getSolverCommand

        String getSolverCommand()
        the command for starting the solver. For example "z3" if it is registered in the PATH variable, otherwise "ABSOLUTE_PATH/z3"

      • setSolverCommand

        void setSolverCommand(String s)

      • getDefaultSolverCommand

        String getDefaultSolverCommand()

      • createTranslator

        SMTTranslator createTranslator(Services services)
        The translator to be used. So far each solver supports only one format.

      • getDelimiters

        String[] getDelimiters()
        The delimiters of the messages that are sent from the solver to KeY. For example it could be "\n"

      • supportsIfThenElse

        boolean supportsIfThenElse()
        Returns true if and only if the solver supports if-then-else terms.

      • modifyProblem

        String modifyProblem(String problem)
        Directly before the problem description is sent to the solver one can modify the problem string by using this method.

      • getVersionParameter

        String getVersionParameter()
        Returns the parameter that can be used to gain the version of the solver when executing it.

      • getSupportedVersions

        String[] getSupportedVersions()
        Returns an array of all versions that are supported by KeY.

      • getVersion

        String getVersion()
        Returns the current version that is installed, if it has already been checked, otherwise null.

      • getRawVersion

        String getRawVersion()
        Retrieve the version string without check for support. Returns null if the solver is not installed.

      • isSupportedVersion

        boolean isSupportedVersion()
        Returns whether the currently installed version is supported.

      • checkForSupport

        boolean checkForSupport()
        Checks for support and returns the result.

      • supportHasBeenChecked

        boolean supportHasBeenChecked()
        returns true if and only if the support has been checked for the currently installed solver.
